message:
fix(freeze): coerce 'this' to globalThis for Node.js compatibility

- Always coerce undefined/null 'this' to globalThis in push_this opcode
- QuickJS-ng incorrectly marks functions as strict mode when ES6 features
  are present in the file, but Node.js doesn't behave this way
- This matches Node.js behavior where regular functions get 'this' coerced
  even when ES6 syntax (const, arrow functions) is used
